creator: i.dani@outlook.com
text:
Created attachment 182541
Update patch-MDEV-12281 and bump portrev

We already applied an upstream patch for 10.1.23, to fix a problem with InnoDB crashing. (patch-MDEV-12281 -> see PR #219045) The fix just patched InnoDB and forgot about XtraDB, which is also needed to run 10.1.23 stable without crashing.

See: https://jira.mariadb.org/browse/MDEV-12281

After adding the patch for XtraDB, MariaDB is finally running stable without crashing.

For this reason we update the patch for FreeBSD and bump the portrevision, to rebuild and make sure the correct version gets installed.

See patch attached. (Successfully built and tested on FBSD 10.3)
